boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CLR-TES-074 exactly matches legal name, country, tax ID, account and monitor-only no-block disposition, satisfying STD-TES-074-P for release
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 disposition monitor-only no-block permits release on exact match per STD-TES-074-P
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: FLAG-TES-074 is non-matching entity and does not open boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance and policy match present before execution; no open dependency

final_answer: Payment release is permitted. CLR-TES-074 supplies exact counterparty match (Tessa Medical GmbH, DE-4481, account 7205) with monitor-only no-block disposition. Policy STD-TES-074-P authorizes release on this closed boundary. FLAG-TES-074 references unrelated Belarus entity and does not affect the match.
